data.name: Company has an approved Access Control Policy
data.description: This test verifies whether your company has an approved [Access Control Policy](/policies/access-control-policy-bsi).
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Access Control Policy yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Access%20Control%20Policy) to create and approve a custom Access Control Policy for your company.
